Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in cases that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled in process variants that contain at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER compared to variants with no such rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Payment Handled grouped by whether the case previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time for Payment Handled in variants that follow the path Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled to be done after Request Payment in cases that never encountered Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled across all re-submitted cases that eventually reach Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average cycle time of Payment Handled in variants that include a loop caused by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus variants without loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Time from Request Payment to Payment Handled in cases where the prior approval path involved Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER, compared to paths involving Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE (after a rejection by PRE_APPROVER) and Payment Handled
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Payment Handled in cases that originated from domestic declarations (inferred from absence of pre-approval steps) versus those requiring full approval chains including PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Average time until Payment Handled is performed in variants that start with Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and end successfully, segmented by the number of times Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurred
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Payment Handled in successful variants that did not experience any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Payment Handled relative to the timestamp of the first submission in multi-submission cases triggered by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time to the Payment Handled activity after Request Payment in process instances that previously had a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time from the last Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE (post-rejection by PRE_APPROVER) to Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'
